reviews.review_msg: Travers is an excellent prof. They're very passionate about their work, which makes the class engaging. Doing the readings and paying attention in class determines whether you succeed in the course; they are so crucial. If you're not a big nerd about sociology, you'll likely not enjoy this course; if you are, you will love it.
The prof makes everything too difficult and nothing makes sense. Think twice before taking a course with this prof it's a horrible experience.

I would not recommend taking a class with this professor. Nothing we learn makes sense and is concerningly always related to theorists like Webber or Durkheim. Getting an A in this class is so difficult unless you're completely fascinated by theorists. I would rather get hit by a bus than be in this class but it is mandatory.
